reasoning: Mongolia shows consistent pattern of peaceful political protests even during major crises. 2025 protests led to PM resignation but were 'entirely peaceful' with no fatalities (Washington Post, Verfassungsblog). Reference value of 1.0 requires >10 fatalities - an unprecedented spike. State Dept report shows only single military hazing death (Nov 2023, outside window). Given Mongolia's stability, zero terrorism history, and peaceful protest culture, probability remains extremely low. Slight increase across forecast horizon accounts for remote chance of unforeseen catastrophe.
